milestones.milestone_id: string; sort milestone objects by milestone_id ascending
milestones.completion_percentage: number; percentage rounded to one decimal place

gating_work_item_ids: string work item IDs; sort ascending
critical_dependency_chain: string work item IDs in dependency order from upstream to downstream; do not sort this list
owner_escalation_ids: string owner IDs sorted ascending; include UNASSIGNED only when a gated item has no owner
